text: Firefighters responded to the three story building shortly after 1 00 p
translation: 下午1点过后不久，消防员对这栋三层建筑做出了响应

text: A team of about 25 firefighters then spent about 25 minutes extinguishing the flames
translation: 随后，一支由约25名消防员组成的队伍花费了约25分钟将火焰扑灭

text: Officials described the structure as a mixed use building that features commercial businesses on the first floor and residential on the second and third floors
translation: 官员称，该建筑为混合用途，一楼为商业场所，二楼和三楼为住宅

text: Town records list four apartments in the building
translation: 城镇记录显示该建筑内有四套公寓

text: Due to smoke and heat damage the four apartments were declared uninhabitable and the six residents had to move to another place officials said
translation: 官员称，由于烟熏和热浪损坏，这四套公寓被宣布不再适宜居住，六名居民不得不搬到别处

text: No injuries were reported in connection with the fire
translation: 据报道，此次火灾未造成人员受伤

text: The Norwalk Fire Marshal is investigating the cause and origin of the fire
translation: 诺沃克市消防局长正在调查火灾的原因和起源

text: The study looks at symptoms of anxiety and depression among more than 70 thousand older adults in Europe
translation: 该研究考察了欧洲七万多名老年人的焦虑和抑郁症状

text: A number of past studies have found the link between season of birth and mental health diagnoses
translation: 过去许多研究都发现了出生季节与心理健康诊断之间的联系

text: Researchers have suggested that such links could arise from various things
translation: 研究人员认为，这种联系可能源于多种因素

text: These include nutrients intake sun exposure climate and disease exposure varying across the course of the year
translation: 这些因素包括一年中变化的营养摄入、阳光照射、气候和疾病接触

text: However evidence has been mixed
translation: 然而，证据并不一致

text: More recent studies have suggested that factors such as social class or economic background have more to do with these diagnoses than month of birth
translation: 最近的研究表明，社会阶层或经济背景等因素与这些诊断的关系比出生月份更大

text: Overall the new study found no significant relationship between participants month of birth and symptoms of depression or anxiety
translation: 总体而言，这项新研究发现参与者的出生月份与抑郁或焦虑症状之间没有显著关系

text: There was some variability in some countries
translation: 在一些国家存在一些差异

text: The clone was born in a laboratory in Beijing in December
translation: 这只克隆犬于12月在北京的一个实验室出生

text: Tests show that the clone and her mother are almost identical genetically
translation: 测试显示，克隆犬与它的母亲在基因上几乎完全相同

text: The mother dog helped solve multiple murders and many other crimes
translation: 这只母犬曾协助侦破多起谋杀案及许多其他犯罪案件

text: The clone has already performed better than traditionally bred dogs on several tests
translation: 在几项测试中，这只克隆犬的表现已经优于传统方式培育的犬只

text: However this goal is not yet possible due to the current costs of the technology
translation: 然而，由于目前这项技术的成本，这一目标尚无法实现

text: This is not the first time a clone has been made of a star police dog
translation: 这并非首次克隆明星警犬

text: A colleague mentioned the book but I've been so busy writing my thesis that I haven't been able to read for pleasure in months
translation: 一位同事提到过这本书，但我一直忙于写论文，好几个月都没能进行休闲阅读了

text: Well sounds like if you're going to read anything for fun this is the book
translation: 嗯，听起来如果你想读点什么娱乐一下，这本书就是不错的选择

text: It's written by a Chinese science fiction writer I can't remember his name but he's written three books in all and The Three Body Problem is the first in the series
translation: 它是由一位中国科幻作家写的，我记不起他的名字了，但他总共写了三本书，《三体》是这个系列的第一部

text: I don't want to say too much and spoil it for you but it's definitely got some amazing technological and sociological concepts in it
translation: 我不想说太多而给你剧透，但里面确实有一些惊人的科技和社会学概念

text: It does sound like it would suit my taste
translation: 听起来确实合我的口味

text: I think it's better to read the book first
translation: 我认为最好先读书

text: It's rare for the show or movie to be better than the book and then you just end up ruining the book for yourself if the show isn't very good
translation: 电视剧或电影很少能比原著更好，如果剧集不太好，你最终只会毁掉自己对这本书的体验

text: I'm a bit overwhelmed with the amount of data I still need to collect to finish my thesis but I still need to relax sometimes
translation: 我为了完成论文还需要收集大量数据，有点应接不暇，但我有时还是需要放松一下

text: It's pretty soon and it's going to be quite long
translation: 很快就要播了，而且会很长

text: Well maybe you could download an electronic copy of the book and try to read it before the show starts
translation: 嗯，也许你可以下载这本书的电子版，试着在剧集开播前读完

text: It's about the Vegetarian Food Festival you are holding on August at the Newcastle City Hall
translation: 是关于你们八月份在纽卡斯尔市政厅举办的素食节

text: It says on your website that you are still looking for vendors and I grow organic vegetables on my farm as well as doing my own home baking
translation: 你们的网站上写着仍在寻找供应商，我在自己的农场种植有机蔬菜，也自己做家庭烘焙

text: Would I be able to sell both the vegetables and items baked from them at the festival
translation: 我可以在节日上同时出售蔬菜和用它们烘焙的产品吗？

text: Do you prefer to fill out an application on the web or to print it out and fill it in by hand and then post it back to us
translation: 您更愿意在线填写申请表，还是打印出来手填后再寄回给我们？

text: Remember that you will have to have all your certificates to hand when you are filling out the forms as the standards are high and they will be carefully checked before anyone will be able to sell their produce at the event
translation: 请记住，填写表格时您需要准备好所有证书，因为标准很高，而且在任何人被允许在活动上销售产品之前，这些证书都会被仔细核查

text: I should be fine with doing it on your website and I already have all my certificates as we run a small farm shop too
translation: 我在你们网站上操作应该没问题，而且我已经有了所有证书，因为我们也经营着一家小型农场商店

text: Sure please address it to the Organic Organization vendor Applications 112 Queens Road Newcastle Northumberland
translation: 当然，请将申请寄往：有机组织供应商申请部，皇后路112号，纽卡斯尔，诺森伯兰郡

text: The postcode is N U 29 3 L J remember that the closing date is next Tuesday June 28th
translation: 邮政编码是NU29 3LJ，请记住截止日期是下周二，6月28日

text: Question twelve why does the woman call the man
translation: 问题12：这名女子为什么打电话给这名男子？

text: It is also cheap at a time when many are worried about what the economic future holds
translation: 在许多人担忧未来经济状况的时候，这种方式也很廉价

text: Most of the coverage of the boom in wild camping has been negative
translation: 关于野外露营激增的报道大多都是负面的

text: Similar action has been taken even in Scotland where camping is usually permitted on most of its open land
translation: 即使在苏格兰也采取了类似行动，那里通常允许在大部分开放土地上露营

text: It would make sense that wild campers need to ask for permission to camp from landowners especially outside Scotland where the law is far more restrictive
translation: 野外露营者需要获得土地所有者的许可才能露营，这很合理，尤其是在苏格兰以外法律更为严格的地区

text: It would be common sense for people to use small tents and leave no trace of their visit
translation: 人们使用小帐篷并且不留下任何到访痕迹，这应该是常识

text: They've been attracted by a patch of land that is close to wilderness and it is their responsibility to keep it that way
translation: 他们被一片接近荒野的土地所吸引，而保持这种状态是他们的责任

text: The Amazon river dolphin is a giant among its species
translation: 亚马逊河豚是其物种中的巨无霸

text: It can measure up to two meters long and weigh around 204 kilograms
translation: 它们身长可达两米，体重约204公斤

text: Size isn't the only thing that sets the Amazon river dolphin apart
translation: 体型并不是亚马逊河豚与众不同的唯一特征

text: This freshwater dolphin is sometimes shockingly pink
translation: 这种淡水海豚有时呈现出惊人的粉红色

text: Their unusual coloring is believed to be the result of scar tissue from dolphin fights whether play fighting or a serious bid for a mate
translation: 它们不寻常的颜色被认为是海豚打斗（无论是嬉戏打斗还是认真的求偶竞争）留下的疤痕组织所致

text: There's also a theory that this color helps the dolphins more readily blend in with their surroundings during heavy rains
translation: 还有一种理论认为，这种颜色有助于海豚在暴雨期间更容易融入周围环境

text: Rivers along the Amazon rainforest turn a pink shade and with their pink coloring male dolphins are harder to detect
translation: 亚马逊雨林沿岸的河流会变成粉红色，而雄性海豚凭借其粉红色外表更难被发现

text: The Amazon wetland system fed by the Amazon River is a crucial place for pink dolphins to breed and since 2018 has been granted internationally protected status
translation: 由亚马逊河滋养的亚马逊湿地系统是粉色海豚繁殖的重要场所，自2018年起已被授予国际保护地位

text: The most common types of financial support include cell phone plans food school costs and car expenses
translation: 最常见的经济支持类型包括手机套餐、食物、学费和汽车费用

text: Parental financial support of early adults said Ken Dickthwaite CEO of Age Wave is the new normal
translation: Age Wave公司首席执行官肯·迪克思韦特表示，父母对早期成年人的经济支持已成为新常态

text: The remaining 71 percent thought that assistance helps the adult children get ahead
translation: 其余71%的人认为这种帮助有助于成年子女取得成功

text: Dick Feld believes the young women and men surveyed were saying that by 25 young adults ought to be financially independent
translation: 迪克·菲尔德认为，受访的年轻男性和女性在说，到25岁时年轻人应该经济独立

text: Financial independence is something they were struggling with and challenged by and it scared them a bit
translation: 经济独立是他们正在努力争取并感到挑战的事情，这让他们有点害怕

text: One big reason they're struggling is attributed to college loans of which the average amounts to$37,000
translation: 他们处境艰难的一个主要原因是大学贷款，平均贷款额高达3.7万美元

text: Many of the parents have taken on college loans for the kids too sometimes at the expense of their own finances
translation: 许多父母也为孩子承担了大学贷款，有时甚至以牺牲自己的财务状况为代价

text: Whether that's likely or even possible anytime soon is anyone's guess
translation: 这种情况是否可能或在短期内能否实现，谁也说不准
